Now, in focusing on this implementation differentiation, we're going to give you two influence aids toward the implementation process, the application process. The first is called the small big. The smallest thing you can do in changing your influence approach that will produce the biggest impact on your influence success, your persuasive success. I first came upon the power and the importance of small bigs like that when I was doing platform presentations at various kinds of conferences or conventions. If I was talking about the seven principles of influence, and let's say I was talking about one of them, the principle of reciprocation, let's say, if I ever said to the audience, now, I'm going to give you the smallest thing you can do to harness the enormous power of this basic and potent human tendency to reciprocate, the room falls silent, pens, poise over pads, fingers over keys, and I get the audience's attention almost as completely as if I had mentioned sex. Why? Our OI is why. Our concern on investment is why. If I can give you a small tactic that requires maybe just changing a word or two in your presentation or maybe the sequence of the order of your presentation, something as small as that, and it produces a big impact on your success, that's an enormous return on that small investment of time and effort. So we'll be sure that in each of the principles, we will include at least one or two small bigs to give you access to this great return on investment tactic, the small big. The second implementation aid that we're going to provide for you within the program is something we call your personal action plan. Throughout the program, we will take you through a variety of exercises that will ensure that you understand the seven principles and can imply them with the greatest impact. But there is one exercise that will be most important. In this program, you'll tackle a specific persuasion challenge you're currently facing. As you move through the course, you'll continuously build an influence plan to attack that specific influence challenge, ending up with an actionable influence blueprint that is uniquely yours.
